abstract: Production integration with remove.bg API for automated background removal on product photos, headshots, and social media assets. Covers API authentication (X-Api-Key header), tier/credit management (free: 50/month, paid: 100-1500+/month), batch processing patterns, and error handling. Includes curl examples, JavaScript integration, bash batch scripts, and 8 common anti-patterns (transparent images, resolution limits, credit exhaustion, wrong type hints, rate limiting, file optimization).
